queries.question: Describe the diagnosis, medications, and body parts affected.
queries.sql: SELECT Conditions.Medication, Conditions.BodyPartAffected, Diagnoses.DiagnosisID FROM Conditions JOIN Diagnoses ON Diagnoses.ConditionID = Conditions. ConditionID;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?medication ?bodypartaffected ?diagnosisid WHERE {
  ?conditions a :Conditions .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasConditions ?conditions .
  ?conditions p:Medication ?medication .
  ?conditions p:BodyPartAffected ?bodypartaffected .
  ?diagnoses p:DiagnosisID ?diagnosisid .
}

queries.question: Describe dates of diagnosis that occurred on or after January 1, 2023, medications used to treat it, and the name of the condition and body parts affected by that diagnosis.
queries.sql: SELECT Conditions.Medication, Conditions.ConditionName, BodyPartAffected, Diagnoses.DateOfDiagnosis FROM Conditions JOIN Diagnoses ON Diagnoses.ConditionID = Conditions.ConditionID WHERE Diagnoses.DateOfDiagnosis >='2023-01-01';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?medication ?conditionname ?bodypartaffected ?dateofdiagnosis WHERE {
  ?conditions a :Conditions .
  ?diagnoses a :Diagnoses .
  ?diagnoses p:hasConditions ?conditions .
  ?conditions p:Medication ?medication .
  ?conditions p:ConditionName ?conditionname .
  ?conditions p:BodyPartAffected ?bodypartaffected .
  ?diagnoses p:DateOfDiagnosis ?dateofdiagnosis .
  ?diagnoses p:DateOfDiagnosis ?dateofdiagnosis_f .
  FILTER(STR(?dateofdiagnosis_f) >= "2023-01-01")
}
